APPLICATION PENDING FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818
Off Calendar Mar-05-2014 Denied

Application Pending For Waiver Of Additional Court Fees And Costs Pursuant To G.C. 68633, Crc 3.51, 8.26, And 8.818
Off Calendar Mar-05-2014 Text Ruling

SHORT CAUSE TRIAL
Off Calendar Feb-18-2014 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, having been assigned from Department 501 for Court Trial/Prove Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Harry M. Dorfman, Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos, Proceedings reported by: Sonia Wong, CSR#11288.

Margaret DeMatteo, Esq., for the Plaintiff TENDERLOIN HOUSING CLINIC, INC.,
Kia Bautista sworn and examined of behalf of the Plaintiff.
No appearance by Defendant DENNIS TILL.
After evidence and good cause appearing, the Court enters Judgment in favor of Plaintiff and against defendant as follows:
The rental agreement is canceled. The Lease is forfeited.
Restitution and Possession of the premises located at 909 Geary St. Room #406, San Francisco, CA 94109.
No Monetary damages. Only Possession.
Judgment signed in open court.

UD JURY TRIALS
Off Calendar Feb-18-2014 Assigned To Trial Court

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Feb-13-2014 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: JPT Barb Anscher; Clerk M. Olopernes; Not Reported. (D501)
Appearances:
Plaintiff Tenderloin Housing Clinic, Inc.is present. Represented by Kia Bautista.
Attorney Margaret Dematteo for the plaintiff.
Defendant Dennis Till DID NOT APPEAR.

The settlement conference is taken off calendar because there was no appearance by defendant Dennis Till. The trial date of FEB-18-2014 remains on calendar. (D501)
